grades.expectation: Response specifies 12 months bank statements for savings showing accumulation pattern
grades.reason: Clearly states '12 months of bank/building society statements' and 'credible accumulation pattern over time'

grades.expectation: Response requires giftor's ID and giftor's bank statements (not just the buyer's)
grades.reason: Explicitly requires 'Giftor's photographic ID' and 'Giftor's bank statements' showing 3-6 months

grades.expectation: Response requires a signed gift letter confirming no obligation to repay
grades.reason: Specifically mentions 'Signed gift letter' confirming 'no obligation to repay'

grades.expectation: Response mentions risk-based approach (not tick-box compliance)
grades.reason: Opens with 'Use a risk-based approach' and mentions documenting reasoning

grades.expectation: Response mentions record-keeping period of 5 years from end of transaction
grades.reason: States 'retain all CDD/source-of-funds records for 5 years from the end of the business relationship'
